summary: Iteration 329: FINAL SUBMARINE-LEVEL AUDIT - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified the critical auth fix: (1) AuthContext now persists zen_user to localStorage on login/register/auth-me. (2) Mixer (UnifiedCreatorConsole.js) now uses useAuth() hook instead of raw localStorage. (3) ME Tab correctly shows user name 'Happy' (not 'Guest') after login with kyndsmiles@gmail.com. (4) Logout (Sever) clears session and redirects to /landing. All 22+ modules tested on mobile viewport 390x844.
